title: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack
message_html: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack ...
snippet: Bullish agreed to acquire Equiniti in a $4.2 billion deal combining its tokenization stack with the global transfer agent’s infrastructure.

title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
message_html: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms ...
snippet: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.
